subparts.text: Explain the effect of optimistic initial action-value estimates on the 10- armed testbed. Is the method biased? Give reasons. 5

What are action critic methods? Explain. 5

questions.question_text: Differentiate between ε-greedy methods, UCB Methods, Gradient Bandit methods. Draw a graph showing parameter study over 1000 steps for the Bandit Algorithms.

How Dynamic programing is different from Temporal differences methods? Explain in a neat tabular form.
Define a finite Markov Decision Process. Explain Agent-Environment interface in an MDP.
Explain Feature Construction for Linear Parameterization Methods.
What are Eligibility traces? What are the advantages of Eligibility traces? Explain any one Eligibility trace method.
What is Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning? What are its key components? How is it advantageous over traditional RL approaches?
What are policy gradient methods? Explain REINFORCE: Monte Carlo-based policy gradient algorithm.
